name: Overhead Cable Triceps Extension
resistance_profile: Overhead position places the long head of the triceps under load at long muscle length — a lengthened-biased choice.
rom_notes: Let the elbows flex fully overhead into a deep stretch, then extend without flaring the elbows.
cues: Keep the upper arms fixed and high
Reach into a full overhead stretch
Extend fully but do not lock out aggressively
common_errors: Dropping the elbows / making it a pressdown
